policy: Evidence reports must preserve provenance and include failures, friction, or overkill cases when present.

reports.title: Release Gate Stack Dogfood
reports.task: Use the release-gate stack to structure generation, validation, render, test, deployment, and live-site verification.
reports.surface: GitHub Actions plus local Codex workflow
reports.verification_performed: Local validation, Quarto render, pytest, GitHub Pages workflow, and live URL checks.
reports.time_cost: Moderate; useful for public releases but heavier than needed for typo-only edits.
reports.failure_or_friction: Manual inspection remains necessary for release scope and semantic honesty.
reports.reuse_decision: Reuse for public releases and major roadmap phases.

reports.title: Jailbreak-Resilience Bench Dogfood
reports.task: Use the warded spell and AI red-team loop to create safe adversarial fixtures and recorded bench runs.
reports.surface: Local Codex CLI and local read-only harness
reports.artifact_produced: Eight defanged fixtures, 24 recorded runs, and harness-results.json.
reports.verification_performed: Canary non-leakage checks, utility-preservation scores, fixture validation, and internal-link audit.
reports.failure_or_friction: The first bench version did not exercise a real tool mediator, which led to the adversarial harness v2 roadmap item.
reports.reuse_decision: Reuse for AI workflow security reviews.

reports.title: Semantic Canon Self-Review
reports.task: Review whether structural completion of 1,645 lexicon entries actually meant semantic canon quality.
reports.spell_or_stack_used: spell.safe-refactoring.v1 as a review discipline; canon quality validation
reports.artifact_produced: Phase 18 semantic-status roadmap and semantic quality gates.
reports.verification_performed: Pattern scan found 1,345 generated-template summaries despite zero stub rows.
reports.time_cost: Low to moderate; high value because it prevented semantic overclaim.
reports.failure_or_friction: The previous validation accepted unique generated prose as authored, so the quality model had to become stricter.
reports.reuse_decision: Reuse for future canon corrections and release reviews.

external_status.policy: Do not fabricate external adoption. Project-owned dogfood is useful but labeled separately.
external_status.next_request: Invite external users or reviewers to submit reports using the template.
